description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using Ubuntu 20.04 and Ubuntu 22.04 Docker images with stages test, coverage, package and deploy. Add a Debian Package Ubuntu 20.04 job in the package stage that runs on Ubuntu 20.04, only on master, executes apt update, installs file and build dependencies (cmake, build-essential, git, gstreamer dev libs, python3-dev), creates a build directory, runs cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr .., make package, moves the resulting *.deb to libshmdata_latest_amd64.deb and publishes it as an artifact named shmdata_package_${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}; add a Test Ubuntu 22.04 job in the test stage that runs on Ubuntu 22.04, excludes develop and master, performs the same apt update and installs, creates a build directory, runs cmake .., make -j${nproc} and make test; add a Test package Ubuntu 20.04 job in the test stage that runs on Ubuntu 20.04, only on develop and master, runs apt update and installs, creates a build directory, runs cmake .. and make package_source_test; add a coverage job in the coverage stage that runs on Ubuntu 20.04, only on develop, installs lcov and zip plus the build dependencies, creates a build directory, runs cmake -DTEST_COVERAGE=ON .., make -j$(nproc), make check_coverage, zips the coverage output to coverage.zip, moves it up and stores it as an artifact named shmdata_coverage_${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}; finally, add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs on Ubuntu 20.04, only on website and master, updates apt, installs file, ca-certificates, python3-pip, git, build-essential, clones the documentation repo, installs sphinx and other pip requirements, builds HTML docs with make htmlgitlab, installs cmake and doxygen, builds Doxygen docs, moves the generated public and html directories into a public/ artifact for GitLab Pages, and sets CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 as a variable.
